original_image_tags: A vertical, aged, off-white document, likely the back of a sheet or a routing slip, with three hole-punch marks at the top. The paper is creased and shows ghosting/bleed-through text from the opposite side, which is largely illegible. The page is stamped multiple times with blue ink, some stamps upside down.

elements.description: Page contains three visible blue ink stamps. Top stamp reads 'RECEIVED-LADD FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE JUL 11 1 58 PM 49'. Middle stamp reads 'RECEIVED-TOLSON FBI DEPT. OF JUSTICE JUL 11 1 10 PM 49'. Bottom stamp reads 'RECEIVED-FLETCHER AUG 8 7 26 PM 49'. There is also a partially visible stamp reading 'JUL 11 7 54 PM 49 RECEIVED-FLETCHER'.

judge.reason: Description A describes the visual content as mostly illegible ghosting/bleed-through text, while Description B quotes specific, detailed verbatim text from multiple stamps, indicating a fundamental contradiction in what is visually present.
